emergent_shortages.title: Bread Shortage
emergent_shortages.description: The taverns need fresh bread before tonight.

emergent_shortages.title: Dry Casks
emergent_shortages.description: Cellars are running low on ale. Bring stock before evening trade.

emergent_shortages.title: Remedy Run
emergent_shortages.description: The local healer is running short on remedies.

emergent_shortages.title: Iron Famine
emergent_shortages.description: The blacksmith's stockpile is depleted. The guard needs new blades.

emergent_shortages.title: Lights Out
emergent_shortages.description: Night patrols need torches. The guard captain is desperate.

emergent_shortages.title: Rigging Emergency
emergent_shortages.description: A ship lost its rigging in the storm. Rope is needed urgently.

emergent_shortages.title: Tanner's Plea
emergent_shortages.description: The leatherworker needs hides to fill a military contract.

emergent_shortages.title: Bandage Crisis
emergent_shortages.description: The healer needs cloth for bandages after a skirmish.

emergent_shortages.title: Refugee Rations
emergent_shortages.description: Refugees from the north need food. The mayor is calling for donations.

emergent_shortages.title: Militia Boost
emergent_shortages.description: The militia needs strength potions before the raid tonight.
